Sage Bot Item Code: AR71


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Crusher Santa Plate Mail

Within a small radius of the armor wearer, all enemies have their attack speed reduced by 50%. Also the cooldown times of their weapon abilities are increased by 1,5 sec.
When an enemy performs a critical attack next to the armor wearer, that enemy has a 60% chance of being frozen. If frozen, they are unable to move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the enemies' gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
